sql.trim: t1.ID, t1.CONTRACT_NO, t1.CONTRACT_NAME, t1.CONTRACT_STATE, t1.CONTRACT_MONEY, t1.CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER, t1.CONTRACT_WB_MONEY, t1.CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME, t1.CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME, t1.CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN, t1.CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END, t1.CONTRACTING_PARTIES, t1.CMD_ORDER, t1.BUSINESS_AREA, t1.ATTRIBUTE02, t1.MILITARY_CM_TYPE, t1.SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE, t1.ITEM_SECRET, t1.PROJECT_CODE, t1.PROJECT_ABBREVIATION, t1.PROJECT_TYPE, t1.CURRENCY, t1.CURRENCY_ZHMC, t1.EXCHANGE_RATE, t1.MULTI_CONTRACT, t1.SIGN_ORG, t1.SIGN_ORG_NAME, t1.UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE, t1.SUPPLIER_NAME, t1.SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO, t1.PURCHASE_MODE, t1.SEAL_TYPE, t1.SEAL_TYPE_NAME, t1.YN_SEAL, t1.YN_SEAL_ZHMC, t1.YN_FRAMEWORK, t1.YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC, t1.YN_AGREED_CYCLE, t1.YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC, t1.YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING, t1.YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC, t1.YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE, t1.YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY, t1.YN_PLDG_CM, t1.YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC, t1.YN_ZD_PRICE, t1.YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC, t1.YN_SIGN_ORDER, t1.CM_ZD_PRICE, t1.SETTLEMENT_METHOD, t1.SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL, t1.SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY, t1.ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM, t1.INTERNET_REMARK, t1.OTHER_FEE_REMARK, t1.GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT, t1.WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE, t1.TEXT_NUM, t1.TEXT_SECRET, t1.TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC, t1.CM_USER_CODE, t1.APPLY_DATE, t1.APPLY_DEPT, t1.APPLY_ID, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.SYS_APPLICATION_ID, t1.LOG_APP_ID, t1.VERSION, t1.OPERATION_TYPE_, t1.CHANG_ID,

mapper.select:
select
from CMJT_CONTRACT t1
order by t1.creation_date desc

select
from CMJT_CONTRACT t1
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into CMJT_CONTRACT
ID,
CONTRACT_NO,
CONTRACT_NAME,
CONTRACT_STATE,
CONTRACT_MONEY,
CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER,
CONTRACT_WB_MONEY,
CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME,
CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END,
CONTRACTING_PARTIES,
CMD_ORDER,
BUSINESS_AREA,
ATTRIBUTE02,
MILITARY_CM_TYPE,
SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE,
ITEM_SECRET,
PROJECT_CODE,
PROJECT_ABBREVIATION,
PROJECT_TYPE,
CURRENCY,
CURRENCY_ZHMC,
EXCHANGE_RATE,
MULTI_CONTRACT,
SIGN_ORG,
SIGN_ORG_NAME,
UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE,
SUPPLIER_NAME,
SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO,
PURCHASE_MODE,
SEAL_TYPE,
SEAL_TYPE_NAME,
YN_SEAL,
YN_SEAL_ZHMC,
YN_FRAMEWORK,
YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY,
YN_PLDG_CM,
YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC,
YN_ZD_PRICE,
YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC,
YN_SIGN_ORDER,
CM_ZD_PRICE,
SETTLEMENT_METHOD,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY,
ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM,
INTERNET_REMARK,
OTHER_FEE_REMARK,
GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT,
WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE,
TEXT_NUM,
TEXT_SECRET,
TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC,
CM_USER_CODE,
APPLY_DATE,
APPLY_DEPT,
APPLY_ID,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
LOG_APP_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE_,
CHANG_ID,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractState,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{contractMoneyUpper,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractWbMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{contractClassifyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractClasstypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractEstimateBegin,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractEstimateEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractingParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cmdOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{businessArea,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{militaryCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{scientificCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{itemSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{projectCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{projectAbbreviation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{projectType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{currency,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{currencyZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{exchangeRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{multiContract,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signOrgName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{supplierContactNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{purchaseMode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sealType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sealTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynSeal,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynSealZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynFramework,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynFrameworkZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynAgreedCycle,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynAgreedCycleZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitaryDirectsigning,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitaryDirectsigningZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitarySupervise,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitarySuperviseCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynPldgCm,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynPldgCmZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynZdPrice,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynZdPriceZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynSignOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cmZdPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{settlementMethod,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{settlementZjBl,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{settlementZjMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{electronicPlatform,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{internetRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{otherFeeRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{groupBusputunderDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{weContractSrType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{textNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{textSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{textSecretZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cmUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{changId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into CMJT_CONTRACT( ID , CONTRACT_NO , CONTRACT_NAME , CONTRACT_STATE , CONTRACT_MONEY , CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER , CONTRACT_WB_MONEY , CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME , CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME , CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN , CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END , CONTRACTING_PARTIES , CMD_ORDER , BUSINESS_AREA , ATTRIBUTE02 , MILITARY_CM_TYPE , SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE , ITEM_SECRET , PROJECT_CODE , PROJECT_ABBREVIATION , PROJECT_TYPE , CURRENCY , CURRENCY_ZHMC , EXCHANGE_RATE , MULTI_CONTRACT , SIGN_ORG , SIGN_ORG_NAME , UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE , SUPPLIER_NAME , SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO , PURCHASE_MODE , SEAL_TYPE , SEAL_TYPE_NAME , YN_SEAL , YN_SEAL_ZHMC , YN_FRAMEWORK , YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC , YN_AGREED_CYCLE , YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC , YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING , YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC , YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE , YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY , YN_PLDG_CM , YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC , YN_ZD_PRICE , YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC , YN_SIGN_ORDER , CM_ZD_PRICE , SETTLEMENT_METHOD , SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL , SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY , ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM , INTERNET_REMARK , OTHER_FEE_REMARK , GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT , WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE , TEXT_NUM , TEXT_SECRET , TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC , CM_USER_CODE , APPLY_DATE , APPLY_DEPT , APPLY_ID , CREATED_BY , CREATED_DEPT , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ORG_IDENTITY , SYS_APPLICATION_ID , LOG_APP_ID , VERSION , OPERATION_TYPE_ , CHANG_ID )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractState,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.contractMoneyUpper,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractWbMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.contractClassifyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractClasstypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractEstimateBegin,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractEstimateEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractingParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cmdOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.businessArea,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.militaryCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.scientificCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.itemSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.projectCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.projectAbbreviation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.projectType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.currency,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.currencyZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.exchangeRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.multiContract,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signOrgName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.supplierContactNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.purchaseMode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sealType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sealTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynSeal,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynSealZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynFramework,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynFrameworkZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynAgreedCycle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynAgreedCycleZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynMilitaryDirectsigning,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynMilitaryDirectsigningZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynMilitarySupervise,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynMilitarySuperviseCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynPldgCm,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynPldgCmZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynZdPrice,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynZdPriceZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynSignOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cmZdPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.settlementMethod,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.settlementZjBl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.settlementZjMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.electronicPlatform,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.internetRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.otherFeeRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.groupBusputunderDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.weContractSrType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.textNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.textSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.textSecretZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cmUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.applyDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.applyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.applyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.changId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update CMJT_CONTRACT
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_NAME = #{contractName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_STATE = #{contractState,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_MONEY = #{contractMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER = #{contractMoneyUpper,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_WB_MONEY = #{contractWbMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME = #{contractClassifyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME = #{contractClasstypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN = #{contractEstimateBegin,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END = #{contractEstimateEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACTING_PARTIES = #{contractingParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CMD_ORDER = #{cmdOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
BUSINESS_AREA = #{businessArea,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
MILITARY_CM_TYPE = #{militaryCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE = #{scientificCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ITEM_SECRET = #{itemSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PROJECT_CODE = #{projectCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PROJECT_ABBREVIATION = #{projectAbbreviation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PROJECT_TYPE = #{projectType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CURRENCY = #{currency,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CURRENCY_ZHMC = #{currencyZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
EXCHANGE_RATE = #{exchangeRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
MULTI_CONTRACT = #{multiContract,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_ORG = #{signOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_ORG_NAME = #{signOrgName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE = #{unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO = #{supplierContactNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PURCHASE_MODE = #{purchaseMode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SEAL_TYPE = #{sealType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SEAL_TYPE_NAME = #{sealTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_SEAL = #{ynSeal,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_SEAL_ZHMC = #{ynSealZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_FRAMEWORK = #{ynFramework,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC = #{ynFrameworkZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE = #{ynAgreedCycle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC = #{ynAgreedCycleZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING = #{ynMilitaryDirectsigning,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC = #{ynMilitaryDirectsigningZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE = #{ynMilitarySupervise,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY = #{ynMilitarySuperviseCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_PLDG_CM = #{ynPldgCm,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC = #{ynPldgCmZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_ZD_PRICE = #{ynZdPrice,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC = #{ynZdPriceZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_SIGN_ORDER = #{ynSignOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CM_ZD_PRICE = #{cmZdPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SETTLEMENT_METHOD = #{settlementMethod,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL = #{settlementZjBl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY = #{settlementZjMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM = #{electronicPlatform,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
INTERNET_REMARK = #{internetRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
OTHER_FEE_REMARK = #{otherFeeRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT = #{groupBusputunderDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE = #{weContractSrType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TEXT_NUM = #{textNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TEXT_SECRET = #{textSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC = #{textSecretZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CM_USER_CODE = #{cmUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
APPLY_DEPT = #{applyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
APPLY_ID = #{applyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LOG_APP_ID = #{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CHANG_ID = #{changId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update CMJT_CONTRACT set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_NO = #{item.contractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_NAME = #{item.contractName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_STATE = #{item.contractState,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_MONEY = #{item.contractMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER = #{item.contractMoneyUpper,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_WB_MONEY = #{item.contractWbMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME = #{item.contractClassifyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME = #{item.contractClasstypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN = #{item.contractEstimateBegin,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END = #{item.contractEstimateEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACTING_PARTIES = #{item.contractingParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CMD_ORDER = #{item.cmdOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BUSINESS_AREA = #{item.businessArea,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MILITARY_CM_TYPE = #{item.militaryCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE = #{item.scientificCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ITEM_SECRET = #{item.itemSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROJECT_CODE = #{item.projectCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROJECT_ABBREVIATION = #{item.projectAbbreviation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PROJECT_TYPE = #{item.projectType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CURRENCY = #{item.currency,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CURRENCY_ZHMC = #{item.currencyZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EXCHANGE_RATE = #{item.exchangeRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , MULTI_CONTRACT = #{item.multiContract,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_ORG = #{item.signOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_ORG_NAME = #{item.signOrgName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE = #{item.unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SUPPLIER_NAME = #{item.supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO = #{item.supplierContactNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PURCHASE_MODE = #{item.purchaseMode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEAL_TYPE = #{item.sealType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEAL_TYPE_NAME = #{item.sealTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_SEAL = #{item.ynSeal,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_SEAL_ZHMC = #{item.ynSealZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_FRAMEWORK = #{item.ynFramework,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC = #{item.ynFrameworkZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_AGREED_CYCLE = #{item.ynAgreedCycle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC = #{item.ynAgreedCycleZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING = #{item.ynMilitaryDirectsigning,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC = #{item.ynMilitaryDirectsigningZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE = #{item.ynMilitarySupervise,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY = #{item.ynMilitarySuperviseCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_PLDG_CM = #{item.ynPldgCm,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC = #{item.ynPldgCmZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_ZD_PRICE = #{item.ynZdPrice,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC = #{item.ynZdPriceZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_SIGN_ORDER = #{item.ynSignOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CM_ZD_PRICE = #{item.cmZdPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , SETTLEMENT_METHOD = #{item.settlementMethod,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL = #{item.settlementZjBl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY = #{item.settlementZjMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM = #{item.electronicPlatform,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INTERNET_REMARK = #{item.internetRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , OTHER_FEE_REMARK = #{item.otherFeeRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT = #{item.groupBusputunderDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE = #{item.weContractSrType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEXT_NUM = #{item.textNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEXT_SECRET = #{item.textSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC = #{item.textSecretZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CM_USER_CODE = #{item.cmUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , APPLY_DATE = #{item.applyDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , APPLY_DEPT = #{item.applyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , APPLY_ID = #{item.applyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LOG_APP_ID = #{item.logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CHANG_ID = #{item.changId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.delete:
delete from CMJT_CONTRACT where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO CMJT_CONTRACT t1 USING dual ON(t1.ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_NAME = #{contractName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_STATE = #{contractState,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_MONEY = #{contractMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER = #{contractMoneyUpper,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_WB_MONEY = #{contractWbMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME = #{contractClassifyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME = #{contractClasstypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN = #{contractEstimateBegin,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END = #{contractEstimateEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACTING_PARTIES = #{contractingParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CMD_ORDER = #{cmdOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
BUSINESS_AREA = #{businessArea,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ATTRIBUTE02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
MILITARY_CM_TYPE = #{militaryCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE = #{scientificCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ITEM_SECRET = #{itemSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PROJECT_CODE = #{projectCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PROJECT_ABBREVIATION = #{projectAbbreviation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PROJECT_TYPE = #{projectType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CURRENCY = #{currency,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CURRENCY_ZHMC = #{currencyZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
EXCHANGE_RATE = #{exchangeRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
MULTI_CONTRACT = #{multiContract,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_ORG = #{signOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_ORG_NAME = #{signOrgName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE = #{unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO = #{supplierContactNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PURCHASE_MODE = #{purchaseMode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SEAL_TYPE = #{sealType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SEAL_TYPE_NAME = #{sealTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_SEAL = #{ynSeal,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_SEAL_ZHMC = #{ynSealZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_FRAMEWORK = #{ynFramework,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC = #{ynFrameworkZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE = #{ynAgreedCycle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC = #{ynAgreedCycleZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING = #{ynMilitaryDirectsigning,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC = #{ynMilitaryDirectsigningZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE = #{ynMilitarySupervise,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY = #{ynMilitarySuperviseCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_PLDG_CM = #{ynPldgCm,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC = #{ynPldgCmZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_ZD_PRICE = #{ynZdPrice,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC = #{ynZdPriceZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_SIGN_ORDER = #{ynSignOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CM_ZD_PRICE = #{cmZdPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SETTLEMENT_METHOD = #{settlementMethod,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL = #{settlementZjBl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY = #{settlementZjMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM = #{electronicPlatform,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
INTERNET_REMARK = #{internetRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
OTHER_FEE_REMARK = #{otherFeeRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT = #{groupBusputunderDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE = #{weContractSrType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TEXT_NUM = #{textNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TEXT_SECRET = #{textSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC = #{textSecretZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CM_USER_CODE = #{cmUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
APPLY_DEPT = #{applyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
APPLY_ID = #{applyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LOG_APP_ID = #{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CHANG_ID = #{changId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CONTRACT_TYPE_ID = #{contractTypeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CONTRACT_PERFORMER = #{contractPerformer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CONTRACT_PERFORMER_CODE = #{contractPerformerCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LY_USER_CODE = #{lyUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LY_USER_NAME = #{lyUserName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JS_TYPE = #{jsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JS_TYPE_NAME = #{jsTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
ID,
CONTRACT_NO,
CONTRACT_NAME,
CONTRACT_STATE,
CONTRACT_MONEY,
CONTRACT_MONEY_UPPER,
CONTRACT_WB_MONEY,
CONTRACT_CLASSIFY_NAME,
CONTRACT_CLASSTYPE_NAME,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_BEGIN,
CONTRACT_ESTIMATE_END,
CONTRACTING_PARTIES,
CMD_ORDER,
BUSINESS_AREA,
ATTRIBUTE02,
MILITARY_CM_TYPE,
SCIENTIFIC_CM_TYPE,
ITEM_SECRET,
PROJECT_CODE,
PROJECT_ABBREVIATION,
PROJECT_TYPE,
CURRENCY,
CURRENCY_ZHMC,
EXCHANGE_RATE,
MULTI_CONTRACT,
SIGN_ORG,
SIGN_ORG_NAME,
UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE,
SUPPLIER_NAME,
SUPPLIER_CONTACT_NO,
PURCHASE_MODE,
SEAL_TYPE,
SEAL_TYPE_NAME,
YN_SEAL,
YN_SEAL_ZHMC,
YN_FRAMEWORK,
YN_FRAMEWORK_ZHMC,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE,
YN_AGREED_CYCLE_ZHMC,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING,
YN_MILITARY_DIRECTSIGNING_ZHMC,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE,
YN_MILITARY_SUPERVISE_COMPANY,
YN_PLDG_CM,
YN_PLDG_CM_ZHMC,
YN_ZD_PRICE,
YN_ZD_PRICE_ZHMC,
YN_SIGN_ORDER,
CM_ZD_PRICE,
SETTLEMENT_METHOD,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_BL,
SETTLEMENT_ZJ_MONEY,
ELECTRONIC_PLATFORM,
INTERNET_REMARK,
OTHER_FEE_REMARK,
GROUP_BUSPUTUNDER_DEPT,
WE_CONTRACT_SR_TYPE,
TEXT_NUM,
TEXT_SECRET,
TEXT_SECRET_ZHMC,
CM_USER_CODE,
APPLY_DATE,
APPLY_DEPT,
APPLY_ID,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
LOG_APP_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE_,
CHANG_ID,
CONTRACT_TYPE_ID,
CONTRACT_PERFORMER,
CONTRACT_PERFORMER_CODE,
LY_USER_CODE,
LY_USER_NAME,
JS_TYPE,
JS_TYPE_NAME,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractState,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{contractMoneyUpper,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractWbMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{contractClassifyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractClasstypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractEstimateBegin,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractEstimateEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractingParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cmdOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{businessArea,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{militaryCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{scientificCmType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{itemSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{projectCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{projectAbbreviation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{projectType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{currency,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{currencyZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{exchangeRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{multiContract,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signOrgName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{supplierContactNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{purchaseMode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sealType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sealTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynSeal,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynSealZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynFramework,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynFrameworkZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynAgreedCycle,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynAgreedCycleZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitaryDirectsigning,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitaryDirectsigningZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitarySupervise,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynMilitarySuperviseCompany,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynPldgCm,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynPldgCmZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynZdPrice,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynZdPriceZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynSignOrder,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cmZdPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{settlementMethod,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{settlementZjBl,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{settlementZjMoney,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{electronicPlatform,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{internetRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{otherFeeRemark,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{groupBusputunderDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{weContractSrType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{textNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{textSecret,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{textSecretZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cmUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{applyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{changId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractTypeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractPerformer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractPerformerCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lyUserCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lyUserName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{jsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{jsTypeName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
mapper.select: select from CMJT_CONTRACT t1 where t1.sync_status in('N','F','E') AND t1.contract_state ='4' AND fmp_flag='0' AND contract_no is not null
mapper.update: update cm.CMJT_CONTRACT dd set sync_Status=#{syncStatus},msg=#{msg} where id =#{contractId}
